item.title: Version 1.11
item.description:
What's New in 1.11

  • # Version 1.11
  • A fresh look — and dark mode that finally looks right everywhere.
  • ## A cleaner, calmer design
  • Second Draft has a new monochrome "carbon and platinum" palette. The panel, settings, and onboarding all feel more focused — less color noise, more attention on your words.
  • ## Dark mode, done right
  • Dark mode used to be patchy, with a few cards and surfaces stuck looking light. Now every screen adapts properly, so Second Draft looks at home whether your Mac is in light or dark.
  • ## A few sharper details
  • Refined recipe badges, clearer selected states, and better contrast throughout so everything's easy to read.
